ddls:
CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the reference (e.g., financial, IT, consultancy) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the reference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the reference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_tags" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated business */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer contact */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer operates in */,
  "annual_revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer started doing business with the organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the customer */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the interaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction */,
  "interaction_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the interaction (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the follow-up */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the interaction (e.g., email, phone, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer service) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date the password was last changed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, data view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
